desktop_app_browser_quit.desc: Terminate the session when the client—either the desktop app or a browser window—is closed.

duration.desc: The session duration, in seconds. The minimum value is 28800, which represents 8 hours; the max value is 315569520 or 10 years (that's a long Slack session).

user_ids.desc: The list of up to 1,000 user IDs to apply the session settings for

desc: Configure the user-level session settings—the session duration and what happens when the client closes—for one or more users.

errors.admin_unauthorized: The token provided doesn't have permission to revoke a session.
errors.at_least_one_session_setting_required: At least one session setting is required.
errors.bots_not_allowed: Bot sessions are not listed by this method.
errors.feature_not_enabled: This method is only available for Enterprise organizations.
errors.not_an_admin: This method is only accessible by Org Owners and Admins
errors.unable_to_update_existing_sessions: The session settings could not be applied to users' existing sessions.
errors.unknown_method: This method is currently not available.
errors.user_not_found: At least one of the requested users doesn't exist.
